prompt: A high-impact anime promotional interview poster designed as a glossy two-page magazine spread for a futuristic live music event. The scene shows a packed nighttime concert arena filled with a crowd holding glowing light sticks in neon yellow, blue, and purple, with a huge illuminated stage in the background, laser beams, bokeh lights, haze, and a giant triangular play-icon screen reading "AI SUPERLIVE SUMMER 2026". In the center foreground are 2 anime-style female presenters seen from a dramatic side and back angle, both looking toward the stage. The left character is ソラ, wearing a dark oversized hooded jacket with black and acid-lime accents, large lime-green headphones marked "06", and raising a bright yellow glow stick overhead; her face is partially obscured by a rectangular privacy block. The right character is ナギ, with a short silver-white bob haircut and fair skin, wearing a pale oversized hooded coat, softly lit by stage lights, holding a white-blue glowing baton near her chest, with an emotional profile expression as she watches the show. Use cinematic rim lighting, richly saturated purple-blue concert colors, reflective fabric highlights, and detailed anime rendering with a polished editorial-advertising finish. Compose the layout like a Japanese special interview feature with dense text overlays, translucent dark panels, thin neon-yellow borders, and bold sans-serif typography. Include 8 distinct text blocks: 1 small header tag at top left reading "/ SPECIAL INTERVIEW /"; 1 large Japanese headline at upper left reading "この夏、AIと音楽の未来がステージで輝く！"; 1 event logo block at upper right reading "AI SUPERLIVE SUMMER 2026" and "2026.7.18 SAT @ FUTURE ARENA ODAIBA"; 3 question-and-answer panels stacked on the left with yellow-framed headers beginning with "Q."; 3 question-and-answer panels stacked on the right with yellow-framed headers beginning with "Q."; plus 2 character intro name boxes near the figures labeled "ソラ" and "ナギ". Add a bold closing Japanese tagline across the bottom left and center reading "AIと音楽が響き合う、新しい夏がはじまる。 一緒に、未来を体験しよう！". At the bottom right, include a footer block repeating the event name and date, plus a visible QR code and a small caption indicating the official website. The overall style should feel like a premium Japanese event flyer, interview article, and key visual combined, energetic, futuristic, emotional, and festival-like.
